glosses.zh-Hans: 服务（顾客）; 操作（机器）
glosses.yue: 招呼（客人）; 操作（機器）
glosses.ja: 接客する; 操作する

sentences.target: Ich kann heute die Kasse bedienen.

translations.de: Ich kann heute die Kasse bedienen.
translations.en: I can operate the register today.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, je peux tenir la caisse.
translations.ko: 오늘은 제가 계산대를 맡을 수 있어요.
translations.ru: Сегодня я могу работать на кассе.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi có thể đứng máy tính tiền.
translations.ar: اليوم أستطيع العمل على جهاز الدفع.
translations.nl: Vandaag kan ik achter de kassa staan.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я можу працювати на касі.
translations.hi: आज मैं कैश रजिस्टर चला सकता हूँ।
translations.el: Σήμερα μπορώ να δουλέψω στο ταμείο.
translations.nb: I dag kan jeg stå i kassa.
translations.id: Hari ini saya bisa jaga kasir.
translations.sv: Idag kan jag stå i kassan.
translations.da: I dag kan jeg stå ved kassen.
translations.ja: 今日はレジを担当できます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; clause subject.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; carries finiteness/tense, selects bare infinitive 'bedienen'.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Kasse' (direct object).
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of 'bedienen'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'kann'. Inseparable verb with prefix 'be-'.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester muss die Gäste bedienen.

translations.de: Meine Schwester muss die Gäste bedienen.
translations.en: My sister has to serve the guests.
translations.es: Mi hermana tiene que atender a los clientes.
translations.fr: Ma sœur doit servir les clients.
translations.it: Mia sorella deve servire i clienti.
translations.pt: Minha irmã tem que atender os clientes.
translations.tr: Kız kardeşim müşterilere servis yapmak zorunda.
translations.vi: Chị tôi phải phục vụ khách.
translations.ar: أختي عليها أن تقدم الطلبات للزبائن.
translations.nl: Mijn zus moet de gasten bedienen.
translations.hu: A nővéremnek ki kell szolgálnia a vendégeket.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन को ग्राहकों की सेवा करनी है।
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου πρέπει να σερβίρει τους πελάτες.
translations.ro: Sora mea trebuie să servească clienții.
translations.ja: 妹はお客さんを接客しなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine singular nominative; modifies 'Schwester' (subject).
Common noun, feminine singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; selects bare infinitive 'bedienen'.
Definite article, plural accusative; determiner of 'Gäste' (direct object).
Common noun, plural accusative; direct object of 'bedienen'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'muss'. Here with human object, meaning 'serve'.

sentences.target: Er darf das neue Tablet bedienen.

translations.de: Er darf das neue Tablet bedienen.
translations.en: He is allowed to operate the new tablet.
translations.es: Él puede usar la tablet nueva.
translations.fr: Il peut utiliser la nouvelle tablette.
translations.it: Lui può usare il nuovo tablet.
translations.ko: 그는 새 태블릿을 사용할 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他可以用新的平板电脑。
translations.pt: Ele pode usar o tablet novo.
translations.vi: Anh ấy được phép dùng máy tính bảng mới.
translations.ar: يسمح له باستخدام الجهاز اللوحي الجديد.
translations.nl: Hij mag de nieuwe tablet gebruiken.
translations.hi: उसे नया टैबलेट इस्तेमाल करने की अनुमति है।
translations.pl: Wolno mu korzystać z nowego tabletu.
translations.el: Του επιτρέπεται να χρησιμοποιεί το νέο τάμπλετ.
translations.nb: Han har lov til å bruke det nye nettbrettet.
translations.id: Dia boleh memakai tablet yang baru.
translations.sv: Han får använda den nya surfplattan.
translations.da: Han må bruge den nye tablet.
translations.ja: 彼は新しいタブレットを使っていいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine nominative; clause subject.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses permission, selects bare infinitive 'bedienen'.
Definite article, neuter singular accusative; determiner of 'Tablet'.
Attributive adjective, neuter singular accusative; modifies 'Tablet'.
Common noun, neuter singular accusative; direct object of 'bedienen'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'darf'. Inseparable verb.

sentences.target: Im Theater darf sie das Lichtpult bedienen.
sentences.reading: /ɪm teˈaːtɐ daʁf ziː das ˈlɪçtpuːlt bəˈdiːnən/

translations.de: Im Theater darf sie das Lichtpult bedienen.
translations.ipa: /ɪm teˈaːtɐ daʁf ziː das ˈlɪçtpuːlt bəˈdiːnən/
translations.en: At the theater, she may operate the lighting console.
translations.es: En el teatro, ella puede manejar la mesa de iluminación.
translations.fr: Au théâtre, elle peut piloter la console lumière.
translations.it: A teatro, lei può gestire la consolle luci.
translations.ko: 극장에서 그녀는 조명 콘솔을 다룰 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 在剧院里，她可以操作灯光控制台。
translations.yue: 喺劇院佢可以操作燈光台。
translations.ru: В театре ей можно управлять световым пультом.
translations.pt: No teatro, ela pode operar a mesa de luz.
translations.he: בתיאטרון מותר לה להפעיל את קונסולת התאורה.
translations.vi: Ở nhà hát, cô ấy được phép vận hành bàn điều khiển ánh sáng.
translations.ar: في المسرح يسمح لها بتشغيل لوحة الإضاءة.
translations.nl: In het theater mag zij de lichttafel bedienen.
translations.uk: У театрі їй дозволено працювати за світловим пультом.
translations.hu: A színházban kezelheti a fényvezérlő pultot.
translations.hi: थियेटर में उसे लाइटिंग कंसोल चलाने की अनुमति है।
translations.pl: W teatrze wolno jej obsługiwać konsoletę oświetleniową.
translations.el: Στο θέατρο της επιτρέπεται να χειρίζεται την κονσόλα φωτισμού.
translations.nb: På teateret har hun lov til å styre lysbordet.
translations.id: Di teater, dia boleh mengoperasikan konsol pencahayaan.
translations.sv: På teatern får hon köra ljusbordet.
translations.ro: La teatru, ea poate opera consola de lumini.
translations.cs: V divadle smí obsluhovat světelný pult.
translations.da: På teatret må hun betjene lysbordet.
translations.ja: 劇場では彼女は照明卓を操作してもいいです。

tokens.explanation: Preposition in contracted form ('im' = 'in dem'); introduces a dative NP and forms a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, neuter singular dative; object of the preposition 'in' (within the contraction 'im'); locative adjunct.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; selects bare infinitive 'bedienen'.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine nominative; clause subject.
Definite article, neuter singular accusative; determiner of 'Lichtpult'.
Common compound noun, neuter singular accusative; direct object of 'bedienen'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'darf'. Inseparable verb.

jp: Ich kann heute die Kasse bedienen.
Meine Schwester muss die Gäste bedienen.
Er darf das neue Tablet bedienen.
Im Theater darf sie das Lichtpult bedienen.

My sister has to serve the guests.
He is allowed to operate the new tablet.
At the theater, she may operate the lighting console.

Él puede usar la tablet nueva.
En el teatro, ella puede manejar la mesa de iluminación.

Ma sœur doit servir les clients.
Il peut utiliser la nouvelle tablette.
Au théâtre, elle peut piloter la console lumière.

Lui può usare il nuovo tablet.
A teatro, lei può gestire la consolle luci.

Mijn zus moet de gasten bedienen.
